hero.title: Your Child's Gateway to Nepali Language
hero.subtitle: BhasaGhar brings professional Nepali language education to diaspora kids ages 4–14. Live classes, cultural stories, and fun activities — all online.

features.title: Why BhasaGhar?
features.subtitle: Designed for diaspora kids who want to stay connected to their heritage
features.f1Desc: Small-group live sessions with expert Nepali teachers via Zoom.
features.f2Desc: 3 progressive levels for ages 4–14. From alphabet to grammar.
features.f3Desc: Stories, festivals, rhymes, and traditions woven into every lesson.
features.f4Desc: Parents get full visibility into homework, grades, and achievements.
features.f5Desc: Flashcards, quizzes, badges, and stories make learning enjoyable.
features.f6Desc: Full English and Nepali interface. Switch anytime.

levels.title: 3 Levels for Every Age

about.title: About BhasaGhar
about.subtitle: Connecting diaspora children with their Nepali roots
about.mission: BhasaGhar (Nepali for 'Language Home') was founded with one purpose: to ensure Nepali children growing up abroad never lose their mother tongue. We combine modern pedagogy with rich cultural content to make language learning a joy.
about.vision: A world where every Nepali diaspora child can speak, read, and write Nepali with confidence and pride.
